title: Association between albumin-corrected anion gap and in-hospital mortality in ICU patients with lung cancer: a retrospective cohort study based on the MIMIC database.
snippet: This retrospective cohort study investigates the association between albumin-corrected anion gap (ACAG) and in-hospital mortality (IHM) among critically ill patients with lung cancer (LC). ACAG was calculated using the formula: ACAG (mmol/L) = anion gap (mmol/L) + [4.4 - albumin (g/dL)] × 2.5, based on the first laboratory measurement within 72 hours o...

title: Global trends and research progress on immunotherapy for-mutant non-small cell lung cancer: a bibliometric analysis.
snippet: Immunotherapy for epidermal growth factor receptor ()-mutant non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) has emerged as a promising treatment strategy, yet global research trends remain uncharacterized. This study aims to provide a comprehensive bibliometric analysis of the field's evolution and current state. The Web of Science Core Collection was searched to ident...
